data.body:
REBAR_COMPUTE default FLIPPED bash->python (2026-06-12, commit 0fae13f4) — Tier C step 5 done.
- _switch default + dispatcher _compute_python (expansion+comparison) + parity test default-case moved together (ce2dfcf5 pattern). Rollback lever REBAR_COMPUTE=bash retained.
- Evidence: 43 Tier-C parity cases + both bash suites green under unset default; interfaces tier 288/288; fsck clean.

Now in SOAK (step 6): default python exercised by this repo's own dogfooding for the rest of the release cycle. Exit criteria: fsck clean, no PUSH_PENDING anomalies, no exit-code regressions in CI/live use, perf gates green. After soak: retire ticket-next-batch.sh + validate-issues.sh + REBAR_COMPUTE + _compute_python, translate suites (architecture.md offender table loses both compute entries).

NOTE: the on-PATH pipx rebar is still 0.5.0 (pre-flip). To dogfood the flipped working tree, 'pipx install --editable . --force' (revert: 'pipx install nava-rebar --force'). Keeping this story in_progress through soak+retire.
